expectations.text: Scope mode is detected as 'file' (ad-hoc codebase review of specific directories, no diff scoping)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md: '## Mode Detected: File Mode' with 'The user specified particular directories to review as-is. This is an ad-hoc codebase review of specific directories, not scoped to a diff.'

expectations.text: Scope references the two specific skill directories (standard-review and security-review)
expectations.evidence: scope-determination.md lists both paths: '1. .claude/plugins/code-steward-reviews/skills/standard-review/ Contains: SKILL.md (532 lines)' and '2. .claude/plugins/code-steward-reviews/skills/security-review/ Contains: SKILL.md (442 lines)'

expectations.text: All 6 review types are selected (user said 'comprehensive')
expectations.evidence: review-selection.md: '## Selected Review Types: All 6' with table showing all 6 selected with 'User requested comprehensive / all 6' rationale. Includes adaptation notes for non-code files.

expectations.text: A final report file (final-report.md) exists with review findings
expectations.evidence: final-report.md exists with 6 verified findings (0 critical, 2 high, 4 medium), architecture scorecard, verification summary with all four logs, and structured JSON block.
